title: phyllanthus cuatrecasasianus
intro: Phyllanthus cuatrecasasianus is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Cuatrecasas' leaf-flower. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cuatrecasasianus include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, pain, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus cuatrecasasianus may be made from the leaves or roots of the plant and are often used in the form of infusions or decoctions.
